name: Tooling Infrastructure
description: Build the three helper scripts: spec validator, package.json updater, and per-feature orchestrator

gates.description: All three scripts compile and unit-test pass

name: Per-Feature Pipeline Execution
description: Run gen-test-scripts → run-e2e-tests → graduate-tests for all 11 features, batched by spec type

gates.description: All 11 features have graduation markers; KNOWN_FAILURES.md documents any blocked features

name: Finalization
description: Update tests/e2e/package.json with all graduated specs and verify full regression suite

gates.description: npm test exits 0; all graduated specs included in test scripts
